texto: Charity fits the economy of scarcity, because it supports the blasphemous myth that the rich are rich because they deserve to be, and their riches are theirs to deal with as they please. With such charity, we are not worthy to tell the story of manna in the wilderness, to pretend to eat together at the Lord’s Supper, or claim the Year of Jubilee as our own.
explicacao: Citação de Michael Rhodes sobre temas ligados a autoestima. “Charity fits the economy of scarcity, because it supports the blasphemous myth that the rich are …” articula autoestima, discipleship, materialism em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como termino e materialism.
